case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. TSITSI HELMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 210021666)
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-20-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR DEC-20-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
